HomePeople

Robotics Lab

The Robotics Lab investigates autonomous manipulation and grounded perception for assistive robots. Our researchers study safe control, long-horizon planning, and the careful documentation of the evidence behind every experimental result, with a sustained focus on reproducible robotics research and transparent reporting of methods and outcomes.
